action.reasoning: Observation: Best AUC improved to 0.7540 with top-15 models and k=100. Remaining time ~2.4 min. Analysis: Ensemble weighting is still yielding small gains. Try top-10 models with k=200 to more aggressively focus on the very best models, and also try a blended approach. Decision: Quick predict.py tweak with top-10 and k=200, submit eval immediately.
